hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); PROTECTED=("xy-app" ".git/" "local.properties" ".keystore" ".jks" "google-services.json"); for pattern in "${PROTECTED[@]}"; do if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == *"$pattern"* ]]; then echo "Blocked: $FILE_PATH is in protected path \"$pattern\". xy-app/ is read-only reference." >&2; exit 2; fi; done; exit 0'
